title: Redact PDF — Permanently Remove Sensitive Data
h1: Permanently Redact Sensitive Information from PDFs Offline
description: Black out sensitive text and images in PDFs entirely in your browser. No cloud risk. Critical for users in Stockholm.

sections.title: Why Redact PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Redacting means the content is classified. Uploading a document you need to hide defeats the whole purpose. Our tool runs 100% offline.

sections.title: How to Permanently Redact a PDF

steps.title: Open Sensitive Document
steps.description: Load the PDF with data that must be hidden.

steps.title: Mark Redaction Areas
steps.description: Draw boxes over content to permanently erase.

steps.title: Apply & Download
steps.description: Content is permanently deleted from the PDF structure.

sections.title: Court-Ready Redaction for Stockholm Law Firms
sections.content: Legal professionals in Stockholm prepare court documents with permanent, offline redaction that removes data from the PDF structure itself.

sections.title: True Permanent Redaction — Not Just Black Boxes
sections.content: Unlike tools that merely cover text with black boxes, our redaction permanently deletes the underlying data from the PDF object structure.

sections.title: Redact Entire Documents Instantly
sections.content: Apply hundreds of permanent redactions to large documents in seconds, completely offline.

faqs.a: Yes, the underlying text and image data is permanently deleted from the PDF structure.
Yes, both text regions and image areas can be permanently redacted.

faqs.q: Can I choose black or white cover?
faqs.a: Yes, pick the redaction style that suits your document.
Our redaction removes data at the PDF object level, meeting court requirements.
